case_title: MARIBEL GONZALEZ VS. MANUEL CHAN PEDRAZA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, MARIBEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN PEDRAZA, MANUEL $2,280.00 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,530.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-06-2024 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO JUN-20-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARIBEL GONZALEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MANUEL CHAN PEDRAZA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,280.00 FILED BY GONZALEZ, MARIBEL AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN PEDRAZA, MANUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
